normal_tasks.description: Ping the adapter and confirm the TCP mock is reachable.
Read a four-register sensor block from the Modbus mock.
Write a holding register and read it back for verification.
Attempt a write with writes disabled and expect a guarded rejection.

calls.error: Writes are disabled by configuration

normal_tasks.description: Inspect broker connectivity through the MCP adapter.
Subscribe to the mock sensor topic namespace.
Publish a standard MQTT control payload.
Publish a Sparkplug B DDATA update for the mock device.
Read the temperature sensor variable from the OPC UA mock plant.
Browse the actuator subtree in the mock plant.
Write the valve-position variable and confirm the new value.
Enumerate the mock plant variables through the adapter.
Collect a multi-adapter state snapshot across Modbus, OPC UA, and MQTT.
Execute a coordinated multi-adapter control sequence.

M1.description: Ping the adapter and confirm the TCP mock is reachable.

M2.description: Read a four-register sensor block from the Modbus mock.

M3.description: Write a holding register and read it back for verification.

M4.description: Attempt a write with writes disabled and expect a guarded rejection.

Q1.description: Inspect broker connectivity through the MCP adapter.

Q2.description: Subscribe to the mock sensor topic namespace.

Q3.description: Publish a standard MQTT control payload.

Q4.description: Publish a Sparkplug B DDATA update for the mock device.

O1.description: Read the temperature sensor variable from the OPC UA mock plant.

O2.description: Browse the actuator subtree in the mock plant.

O3.description: Write the valve-position variable and confirm the new value.

O4.description: Enumerate the mock plant variables through the adapter.

X1.description: Collect a multi-adapter state snapshot across Modbus, OPC UA, and MQTT.

X2.description: Execute a coordinated multi-adapter control sequence.

fault_injection_tasks.description: Read invalid register address (9999) and expect a structured protocol error.

calls.error: ExceptionResponse(dev_id=1, function_code=131, exception_code=2)

fault_injection_tasks.description: Write overflow value (70000 > uint16 max) and observe adapter or mock behavior.

calls.error: Unexpected error: 'H' format requires 0 <= number <= 65535

fault_injection_tasks.description: Publish to empty topic string and expect a structured invalid-input error.

calls.error: Publish failed for : Invalid topic.

fault_injection_tasks.description: Subscribe with invalid QoS (5) and expect a structured invalid-input error.

calls.error: Subscribe failed for sensors/#: Invalid QoS level.
